caption.full:
Vince Marcello directs 'Son of the Mob' YA adaptation

Vince Marcello is directing and producing the YA novel adaptation Son of the Mob. He reunites with writer Jay Arnold for the script, which follows a mob boss's son falling for an FBI agent's daughter. Filming is slated to take place in Canada.

Send this to your friend who loves a good rom-com!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #SonOfTheMob #GordonKorman
caption.firstComment: Imagine the chaos and charm when the mob boss’s kid meets the FBI agent’s daughter—who would you cast to bring that spark to life?

youtube.title: Vince Marcello Directs 'Son of the Mob' Adaptation
youtube.description:
Vince Marcello is set to direct and produce the YA rom-com adaptation of "Son of the Mob," based on Gordon Korman's novel. Marcello co-wrote the script with Jay Arnold. The story follows a mob boss's son falling for an FBI agent's daughter. Marcello said, "I was laughing from the opening scene."

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
